step_rationale: B-cell recruitment and macrophage reprogramming; drives pro-thrombotic inflammation.
mechanism: CXCL13 recruits B cells and reprograms macrophages into pro-thrombotic niches, intensifying plaque inflammation.

references.title: Arachidonic acid fuels inflammation by unlocking macrophage protein phosphatase 5 after myocardial infarction.
Extracellular vesicles from the lung pro-thrombotic niche drive cancer-associated thrombosis and metastasis via integrin beta 2.
